metadata.description: Short prefix used in every resource name (2-4 chars).
AAD object id (GUID) of the user/group set as Azure SQL AAD admin. Will also receive Key Vault Secrets Officer to manage secrets locally.
AAD UPN/email of the user/group set as Azure SQL AAD admin (display login).
Tenant id where AAD principals live.
Container App SKU: 1 = always warm; 0 = scale to zero.
Initial container image. Bicep deploys a placeholder; azd or CI updates it after the first push.

variables.sqlConnectionString: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;Authentication=Active Directory Default;User Id={2}', parameters('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('managedIdentityClientId'))]
